description.text: Submodel containing technical data of the asset and associated product classificatons
Teilmodell, das die technischen Daten des Assets und die zugehörigen Produktklassifizierungen enthält
General information, for example ordering and manufacturer information

Legally valid designation of the natural or judicial person which is directly responsible for the design, production, packaging and labeling of a product in respect to its being brought into circulation
Imagefile for logo of the company provided in common format (.png, .jpg)
Short description of the product (short text)
unique product identifier of the manufacturer
by manufactures issued unique combination of numbers and letters used to identify the device for ordering
Pictorial representations of the product also related to different applications
Picture of the product (low resolution) 72 dpi / rgb (GIF or JPG)
Notes or explanations about the image provided
Product classifications by association of product classes with common classification systems
Reference to the scheduled collection of abstract concepts that are used to distinguish and order objects
Referenced state of the published classification system
Classification system URL
Class of the associated product or industrial equipment in the classification system. According to the notation of the system (IRDI)
Unique class code in a classification hierarchy
Name of product class in the used classification system
Reference to technical property area
List of all technical property areas
The idShort is arbitrary. Using displayName is recommended.
Groups related information for Section.
Every SMC with a specific semanticId can serve as a section. The idShort is arbitrary. The use of a displayName is recommended.
Every SMC with a specific semanticId can serve as a section. The idShort is arbitrary. The use of a displayName is recommended.
Specifies Arbitrary Property.
Specifies multilingual information for Arbitrary MLP.
Specifies the allowed range for Arbitrary Range.

Every property can be used. The idShort is arbitrary. The use of a displayName is recommended.
Every multilanguage property can be used. The idShort is arbitrary. The use of a displayName is recommended.
Every range property can be used. The idShort is arbitrary. The use of a displayName is recommended.
Further information on the product, the validity of the information provided and this data record
Statement by the manufacturer in text form, e.g. scope of validity of the statements, scopes of application, conditions of operation.
Date at which a product, process, norm or similar becomes invalid
Specific description areas for multiple use cases or areas of ​​application

qualifiers.value: Name of SMC is use case or application
